# frequency

**Instance Property**

A value that determines the size and spacing of concentric spheres.

## Declaration

```swift
var frequency: Double { get set }
```

## Discussion

Higher frequencies increase the number of and decrease the spacing between concentric spheres. The default value is `1.0`.
title: frequency
